case_title: KATHRYN L FOX VS. AMERICAN INFLUENCE GROUP, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOX, KATHRYN L AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN INFLUENCE GROUP, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMP ANY DBA TONG FEI GYMNASTICS CENTER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX, KATHRYN L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN INFLUENCE GROUP, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMP ANY DBA TONG FEI GYMNASTICS CENTER $1,521.14 PRINCIPAL, $3.47 INTEREST, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,672.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
